_about: Durable source of truth for THE ORIGINALS playlist (the pre-2000 sources paired to the 2026 reworks in ../remix-rave). Read by the skill scripts run from this research/ dir. Committed with picks/overrides/curator.json + article.md; build artifacts + ../playlist_items.json are gitignored.

playlist.title: Remix Rave — The Originals (Pre-'00 Sources)
playlist.description: The pre-2000 club, rave and soul records that later producers keep going back to — New Order (1983) through Fatboy Slim (1999). The source half of the Remix Rave pair: each track is the original behind the same-numbered entry in the sibling reworks playlist. Discogs-verified, master links, built with the discogs-playlist skill. Full annotated table (Discogs links + notes) on GitHub: https://github.com/dnk8n/awesome-vibe-coded-playlists/blob/main/playlists/remix-rave-originals/remix-rave-originals.md
